creator: marklmi26-fbsd@yahoo.com
text:
It has been a little over 15 days since attachment 236582 . If I
understand right, at this point any committer with an interest
could commit some variation on it that they find appropriate
in order to get EDK2 building on FreeBSD's aarch64 build servers.

(I'm fine with others adjusting what I submitted. Or they can
have me do so if adjustments are appropriate.)
